findings.description: BLS API free-tier rate limit (25 req/day) exhausted during bulk population — 16 states failed with 'no series' due to rate limiting, not invalid series IDs
NOT NULL constraint on employment_growth_rate caused 26 cities to fail creation when BLS data unavailable — fixed by making field nullable (migration 0021)
Incorrect Census place codes: Nashville (52000→52006), Indianapolis (36000→36003) — both returned HTTP 204/503, fixed to correct 'balance' codes
Duplicate Seattle entry in MAJOR_CITIES list (lines 60 and 69) — removed duplicate
ATTOM API key (541e2820...4e1e) returns 401 on all endpoints — requires new key from user

blockers: ATTOM API key expired — GA-5/GA-6 require new key
BLS API rate limit requires caching (fixed) but key may still need upgrade for bulk runs
